case_title: BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO (BODY SHOP) VS. PAGE ONE AUTOMOTIVE CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO (BODY SHOP) PER ORDER OF THE COURT FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUL-22-2003 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-07-2003. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY DAVID DAVENPORT. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
